title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Canara Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Canara Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!
